title: TUI CLI Surrogate + Pipeline Traceability
description: Replace direct REST calls in TUI pipeline with hex CLI subprocess calls. Establish project_id as root of all traceability.

steps.description: Add --json output mode to hex task create, hex task complete, hex analyze, and hex inference complete commands
acceptance: hex task create <swarm_id> <title> --json returns {"id": "...", "status": "pending"}
hex task complete <id> <result> --json returns {"id": "...", "status": "completed"}
hex analyze <path> --json returns {"score": N, "violations": [...]}
All commands exit 0 on success, non-zero on failure with JSON error on stderr

steps.description: Create CliRunner utility in hex-cli/src/pipeline/ that wraps subprocess calls to the hex binary with JSON parsing
acceptance: CliRunner::new() locates hex binary (same binary, argv[0] or PATH lookup)
CliRunner::run(args) -> Result<serde_json::Value> executes and parses JSON stdout
Timeout of 30s per command, configurable
Errors include stderr content for debugging

steps.description: Replace supervisor.rs direct REST calls with CliRunner: create_tracking_task, complete_tracking_task
acceptance: create_tracking_task uses hex task create instead of POST /api/swarms/{id}/tasks
complete_tracking_task uses hex task complete instead of PATCH /api/swarms/tasks/{id}
Agent ID is passed via --agent-id flag
Tasks show correct status in hex report latest

steps.description: Replace code_phase.rs task tracking REST calls with CliRunner
acceptance: execute_all_tracked_in uses hex task complete for each step
Task status updates appear in swarm status
Quick mode code phase still tracks tasks correctly

steps.description: Replace validate_phase.rs fetch_analysis with hex analyze --json
acceptance: ValidatePhase uses hex analyze <output_dir> --json instead of GET /api/analyze
Architecture score (0-100) flows into quality_result on the session
Violations list populates the report

steps.description: Replace swarm_phase.rs task creation with hex task create --json
acceptance: SwarmPhase uses hex swarm init and hex task create instead of direct POST
task_id_map populated from CLI JSON responses
Project ID included in swarm creation

steps.description: Wire quality_result into session from supervisor run — populate score, grade, compile/test results
acceptance: After supervisor.run(), session.quality_result is populated with score/grade/compile/test data
hex report latest shows numerical score and grade in Quality Gate section
Quality gate section shows compile status, test counts, and violation counts

steps.description: Update report.rs to fetch project metadata from hex project list --json for older sessions without project_id
acceptance: Report shows project_id for all sessions (new and old)
Falls back to hex project list when session.project_id is None
JSON report includes project_id field

steps.description: Add swarm agent report sections to audit report — reviewer findings, test results, UX issues, documentation status
acceptance: Report has 'Agent Reports' section after Quality Gate
Shows per-agent: role, objective addressed, duration, pass/fail, summary
At least reviewer, tester, documenter, UX agent results visible when supervisor ran

steps.description: Integration test: run hex dev start --quick with a simple feature and verify full report traceability
acceptance: hex dev start 'test feature' --quick completes successfully
hex report latest shows: project_id, session_id, swarm_id, all tasks completed
All tool calls logged with model, tokens, cost
Quality gate shows numerical score from hex analyze
